assets.notes: Visually useful text-free family board, but rejected for production because generated resolution is 1672x941. Project workflow forbids promoting non-canonical generated outputs as production sprite sheets, slices, or runtime assets.
Native image generation produced a text-free pause shell/button family board, but the output resolution is 1672x941. It remains helper-only and was not sliced or integrated into runtime.

notes: Production sprite family generation is blocked until the image backend can emit acceptable canonical/native-proportion output. Runtime must not use the full reference as an overlay.
